feat.name: Devastating Shield Wallop
feat.text: The impact of your shield sends foes tumbling to the ground. When you use Shield Wallop, after its other effects, the target attempts a Fortitude saving throw against your class DC. If your shield is a tower shield, fortress shield, or another shield that grants a higher circumstance bonus to AC when you Take Cover behind it, the target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to this saving throw.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.critical_success: The target takes no additional effect.
feat.success: The target is off-guard to you until the end of the current turn.
feat.critical_failure: The target is knocked prone and stunned 1.
